news.title: Anthropic seeks to debunk Pentagon's claims about its control over AI technology in military systems
news.description: Anthropic on Wednesday told an appeals court that it can’t manipulate its artificial intelligence tool Claude once it is deployed in classified Pentagon military networks

news.title: Anthropic has surged to a trillion-dollar valuation on secondary markets, overtaking OpenAI
